# Changelog and Status Standard

## Goal

Maintain clear understanding of:

- completed work
- in-progress work
- merged changes
- remaining backlog
- follow-up issues
- key decisions

## Primary Mechanism

Use GitHub-native artifacts as live status.

## Status Signals

- Issue labels/states for lifecycle visibility.
- Issue comments for planning and block reasons.
- PR body and comments for implementation progression.
- PR review summaries for validation outcomes.
- Merge records and closure comments for completion.

## Framework File Updates

Normal runs should not require editing framework internals for status tracking.
